name: Phase 1 — Discovery & Ideation
description: Discover your project idea and define your MVP.

name: Phase 2 — Product Creation
description: Turn your idea into a working product. Think like a creator.

name: Phase 3 — Testing & Validation
description: Test your product, understand how it works, and improve it.

name: Phase 4 — Deployment
description: Launch your project and share it with the world.

name: Phase 5 — Portfolio & Showcase
description: Build your portfolio and present your achievements.
